title: NeviSight
summary: AI-supported risk stratification for choroidal nevus assessment and follow-up, with emphasis on interpretable outputs, external validation, and integration into ocular oncology screening workflows.

title: AOBP Registry
summary: A REDCap registry for the Alberta Ocular Brachytherapy Program, currently undergoing validation to support reliable clinical data capture, outcomes research, and future multi-site ocular oncology studies.

title: PROM-UM
summary: A patient-reported outcome measure for post-brachytherapy uveal melanoma care, focused on capturing patient experience in a clinically and psychometrically meaningful way.

title: Core Outcome Set
summary: A shared minimum outcome framework for ocular oncology studies, intended to improve consistency in what researchers measure and make findings easier to compare across studies, clinics, and datasets.

title: Standardized Referral
summary: A program studying referral pathways for suspected uveal melanoma, including delayed referral rates, referral-letter quality, and patient perceptions of referral delays.

title: ERAS in Ocular Oncology
summary: Development of a formal enhanced recovery protocol for ocular oncologic surgery, with attention to perioperative evidence, implementation, and clinical consensus.

title: Pre-RAS
summary: Development of a structured preparation and recovery-planning program for uveal melanoma patients undergoing ocular oncology care.

title: Textbook Outcomes
summary: Benchmark development for defining high-quality ocular oncology surgical care using outcomes that are clinically meaningful, measurable, and comparable.
